welcome.title: Welcome to MetaMates
welcome.subtitle: For people with too many sparks and too little time to organize
welcome.description: You don’t need a note-taking system first. Two parts, one loop:
welcome.desktopNote: Fragments go into the vault on the left; **chat with AI on the right is your daily starting point**—results land in files, data stays on your machine.

features.agent: Thinking engine — chat on the right is the main entry; one sentence to start
features.commands: Methodology commands — `/today`, `/graduate`, etc.: read vault, process, write back
features.vault: Inspiration vault — diary, inbox, project notes as local Markdown
features.capture: Mobile capture — drop ideas into the vault Inbox from your phone

workspace.title: Choose your inspiration vault
workspace.description: Pick a local folder for fragments, diary, and project notes. AI reads and writes here. On first run we create inbox, diary, and more—**messy first, organized later**.
workspace.skillsSynced: Synced {{count}} workspace template item(s) (memory index & skills)
workspace.desktopOnly: This step is for the desktop app only

agent.title: Connect the thinking engine
agent.description: This is the key step. Once connected, **the right panel is your main UI**—no long note required. Say what you want; AI reads the vault and writes results.
agent.none: No AI assistant found. Without a CLI, MetaMates is vault-only—no chat or /today commands. Please install one to continue.
agent.skipHint: Skip for now and connect from the panel on the right
agent.connectLater: After entering the app, start chatting in the AI panel on the right

complete.title: You’re ready to work
complete.subtitle: Pick an AI on the right and say what you want to do now—or tap `/today` for today’s plan.
complete.noAgentSubtitle: No AI assistant detected yet. Without a CLI, MetaMates is vault-only—no chat or /today commands. We recommend installing one first.
complete.noAgentHint: Install Gemini, Claude, or CodeBuddy below—about 2 minutes to enable the thinking engine.
